languages.text: {n}До вас доносится тихий рык Батошски.{/n} "Всех офицеров благородных кровей мы вздернули через пару поколений. Остались сильные и смелые люди, которые стали моими предками".
{n}You hear a low growl from Batoshski.{/n} "Any officers of noble blood we strung up within a couple of generations. The strong and the brave remained. They were my ancestors."
languages.original_text: {n}До вас доносится тихий рык Батошски.{/n} "Всех офицеров благородных кровей мы вздернули через пару поколений. Остались сильные и смелые люди, которые стали моими предками".

traits.locale_text: {n}You hear a low growl from Batoshski.{/n} "Any officers of noble blood we strung up within a couple of generations. The strong and the brave remained. They became my ancestors."

{n}You hear a low growl from Batoshski.{/n} "Any officers of noble blood we strung up within a couple of generations. The strong and the brave remained. They were my ancestors."

languages.text: {n}Du hörst ein tiefes Knurren von Batoshski.{/n} "Alle Offiziere von adeligem Blut wurden im Laufe einiger Generationen aufgeknüpft. Die Starken und Tapferen überlebten. Sie waren meine Vorfahren."
languages.original_text: {n}You hear a low growl from Batoshski.{/n} "Any officers of noble blood we strung up within a couple of generations. The strong and the brave remained. They were my ancestors."

traits.locale_text: {n}Du hörst ein tiefes Knurren von Batoshski.{/n} "Alle Offiziere von adeligem Blut wurden im Laufe einiger Generationen aufgeknüpft. Die Starken und Tapferen überlebten. Sie waren meine Vorfahren."

languages.text: {n}Batoshski émet un léger grognement, que vous ne manquez pas de remarquer.{/n} « Nous avons fait pendre tous les officiers de sang noble en l'espace de quelques générations. Seuls les plus forts et les plus courageux sont restés. Ils étaient mes ancêtres. »
languages.original_text: {n}You hear a low growl from Batoshski.{/n} "Any officers of noble blood we strung up within a couple of generations. The strong and the brave remained. They were my ancestors."

traits.locale_text: {n}Batoshski émet un léger grognement, que vous ne manquez pas de remarquer.{/n} « Nous avons fait pendre tous les officiers de sang noble en l'espace de quelques générations. Seuls les plus forts et les plus courageux sont restés. Ils étaient mes ancêtres. »

languages.text: {n}Oyes un gruñido grave que proviene de Batoshski.{/n} «Ahorcamos a cualquier oficial de sangre noble en las primeras generaciones. Solo quedaron los fuertes y los valientes. Esos fueron mis antepasados».
languages.original_text: {n}You hear a low growl from Batoshski.{/n} "Any officers of noble blood we strung up within a couple of generations. The strong and the brave remained. They were my ancestors."

traits.locale_text: {n}Oyes un gruñido grave que proviene de Batoshski.{/n} «Ahorcamos a cualquier oficial de sangre noble en las primeras generaciones. Solo quedaron los fuertes y los valientes. Esos fueron mis antepasados».

languages.text: {n}Batoshski'den alçak bir hırıltı çıkıyor.{/n} "Soylu kana sahip subayları birkaç nesil içinde ipe çektik. Güçlüler ve cesurlar kaldı. Benim atalarım da onlardır."
languages.original_text: {n}You hear a low growl from Batoshski.{/n} "Any officers of noble blood we strung up within a couple of generations. The strong and the brave remained. They were my ancestors."

traits.locale_text: {n}Batoshski'den alçak bir hırıltı çıkıyor.{/n} "Soylu kana sahip subayları birkaç nesil içinde ipe çektik. Güçlüler ve cesurlar kaldı. Benim atalarım da onlardır."

languages.text: {n}你听到巴托什斯基低吼了一声。{/n}“那些出身贵族的军官，不出几代就全被我们吊死了。留下来的都是强者和勇者，他们才是我的祖先。”
languages.original_text: {n}You hear a low growl from Batoshski.{/n} "Any officers of noble blood we strung up within a couple of generations. The strong and the brave remained. They were my ancestors."

traits.locale_text: {n}你听到巴托什斯基低吼了一声。{/n}“那些出身贵族的军官，不出几代就全被我们吊死了。留下来的都是强者和勇者，他们才是我的祖先。”

languages.text:
{n}バトシフスキーから低い唸り声が聞こえる。{/n}
「数世代にわたって、貴族の血を引く者たちは皆、吊るされた。強くて勇敢な者だけが生き残った。彼らが私の祖先だ。」
languages.original_text: {n}You hear a low growl from Batoshski.{/n} "Any officers of noble blood we strung up within a couple of generations. The strong and the brave remained. They were my ancestors."

traits.locale_text:
{n}バトシフスキーから低い唸り声が聞こえる。{/n}
「数世代にわたって、貴族の血を引く者たちは皆、吊るされた。強くて勇敢な者だけが生き残った。彼らが私の祖先だ。」
